<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart-bash-408" location="lines:408-413" -->
```bash
  # Decode base64 hash to temp file
  printf '%s' "$TRANSACTION_HASH" | base64 --decode > /tmp/tx_hash.bin
 
  # Sign and encode to base64
  SIGNATURE=$(openssl pkeyutl -sign -inkey external_party_private.pem -rawin -in /tmp/tx_hash.bin | base64 | tr -d '\n')

```
